name: CLARK: Closed-loop Learning for Adaptive Reasoning over Knowledge Graphs

description: arXiv:2607.19996v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Machine Learning models are widely used for automating classification tasks by extracting statistical patterns from data. However, their performance deteriorates if the data distribution changes, making them ill-suited to handle uncertain and evolving information. Moreover, they provide limited support for integrating prior knowledge. To address t...
author: Yousef Khan, Luca Gherardini, Marco Maratea, Joel Arrais, Jose Sousa
